prompt: Help me set up a Python multi-agent system with the agent SDK where a coordinator delegates to researcher and writer subagents. I need the full working code with proper typing.

assertions.text: Uses correct import from claude_agent_sdk (not claude_code_sdk)
Uses snake_case for option names (allowed_tools, max_turns, etc.)
Includes 'Agent' in allowed_tools for the coordinator
Defines at least 2 subagents (researcher and writer)
Uses async for pattern with query() or ClaudeSDKClient
Includes asyncio.run() or proper async entry point
